overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a convertible driving through a desert highway toward a futuristic city skyline. The vehicle navigates through sparse traffic, passes roadside structures including a gas station with neon signage, and stops at an intersection before continuing. The scene features warm desert tones with rocky formations and cyberpunk city elements in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a convertible driving along a desert highway, following a lead vehicle. The landscape features sparse desert vegetation, utility poles lining the road, and a futuristic city skyline visible in the far distance. A futuristic aircraft flies overhead around the 4-second mark, adding to the cyberpunk atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the highway, passing a prominent gas station with a large green neon sign on the left. The ego car overtakes several slower vehicles on the right side around the 18-second mark. Abandoned structures and billboards line the roadside while the utility poles recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with stop sign and solar farm in distance

vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, coming to a stop at the stop sign, then turning right onto a different road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a highway intersection, slowing down to stop at a stop sign visible on the right. After briefly stopping, the car turns right onto a different road. In the distance, a large solar farm installation spans the horizon under the bright desert sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with prominent rocky cliff formations

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the vehicle continues along a desert highway with dramatic rocky cliff formations now prominent on the right side. Abandoned structures including a derelict gas station line the left side of the road. The solar farm remains visible in the distance to the left as the car maintains high speed toward the distant city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide desert highway toward a futuristic city skyline, transitioning from open plains to a rugged canyon landscape. It begins by following a lead vehicle past sparse vegetation and utility poles, while a futuristic aircraft streaks across the sky above. As the car accelerates, the scene shifts past a gas station with a prominent green neon sign and various roadside billboards before the vehicle overtakes slower traffic. The camera then tracks the car as it slows to a stop at a highway intersection, turning right to reveal a massive solar farm spanning the horizon under the bright sun. Finally, the environment transforms into a corridor of dramatic rocky cliff formations and derelict buildings as the vehicle maintains high speed toward the distant urban silhouette.
